name: Admiral Group plc
lede: Admiral runs two centers in Gurugram. Gurugram, covering CoE and GCC/GIC, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Admiral office in India. We map two, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Admiral Group plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Admiral runs 2 verified centers in Gurugram, covering CoE and GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Admiral's India footprint covers Gurugram, spanning CoE and GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all ten decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Admiral operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.a: Admiral runs CoE and 1 additional center type in India.
